text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 51 

MDCD_RACE_ETHNCTY_CD 

LABEL: Medicaid — Race and Ethnicity Constructed Code — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the Medicaid beneficiary’s race and ethnicity code. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: T-MSIS DE file 

VALUES: 1 = White, non-Hispanic 
2 = Black, non-Hispanic 
3 = Asian, non-Hispanic 
4 = American Indian and Alaska Native (AIAN), non-Hispanic 
5 = Hawaiian/Pacific Islander 
6 =
